meta.defaultDescription: Web, e-commerce and mobile apps (React Native / Flutter) for UK and Italian businesses. ROI, performance and scale.
meta.servicesDescription: Websites, mobile apps, cloud and SEO focused on ROI for UK and Italian clients.
meta.visionDescription: Technical scalability, evolving architectures and product roadmap for Alvenco.
meta.contactsDescription: Request a quote or an intro call with Alvenco Ltd.

hero.headlineBefore: Websites, e-commerce and mobile apps that
hero.sub: Team split across the UK and Italy: solid engineering, business-led UX and clear support in English and Italian. From MVP to enterprise product.
hero.trust: SSL, SEO best practices and cloud-ready architectures.

valueCards.title: High-converting web & landing pages
valueCards.body: Core Web Vitals, technical SEO and clear messaging for UK/IT markets.

valueCards.title: Native-quality apps, one team
valueCards.body: React Native and Flutter with release pipelines and store readiness.

valueCards.title: Data that guides spend
valueCards.body: Event tracking, funnels and readable reports for commercial decisions.

home.pricingIntroTitle: Plans built to monetise and scale
home.pricingIntroBody: Three distinct product lines: website, mobile app and e-commerce. Each block has three scroll-animated tabs so you can compare ROI quickly.
home.ctaBandTitle: Need a tailored plan or a free audit?
home.ctaBandBody: Tell us your goals and timeline — we reply within one business day.

pricingWeb.title: Digital presence and measurable growth
pricingWeb.description: Maintenance, hosting and continuous optimisation: less operational risk, more qualified leads.

plans.name: Plan A
plans.subtitle: Ideal for a stable, secure online presence.

plans.name: Plan B
plans.subtitle: For teams that want data and priority support.

plans.name: Plan C
plans.subtitle: Technical partner with a shared roadmap.

pricingMobile.title: React Native & Flutter
pricingMobile.description: From MVP to production: one iOS/Android codebase, integrations and adoption metrics.

plans.name: MVP App
plans.subtitle: React Native or Flutter — fast time-to-market.
bullets: One platform (iOS or Android) + design system

plans.name: Cross-platform
plans.subtitle: Same codebase, maximum coverage.
bullets: iOS + Android from a single codebase

pricingEcommerce.title: Custom store & inventory
pricingEcommerce.description: Tailored stores focused on stock, integrations and checkout conversion.

plans.name: Commerce Suite
plans.subtitle: Complex, international e-commerce.
bullets: Observability, catalogue A/B tests, dedicated SLA

contactForm.name: Full name
contactForm.success: Message sent. We’ll get back to you shortly.

contactsPage.title: Let’s talk about your next release
contactsPage.intro: We respond from the UK and Italy. Share your stack, target market and urgency — we’ll prepare a clear proposal.
contactsPage.formHint: Submissions are sent securely to our team by email (Resend).

servicesPage.title: ROI-first: technology in service of the business
servicesPage.intro: Every offer is structured to reduce risk, speed up time-to-value and tie marketing spend to measurable outcomes.
servicesPage.quoteTitle: Request a proposal for our services
servicesPage.quoteBody: Describe goals and context: whether you need web, app, cloud, SEO or a combined package. We’ll reply with a clear estimate.

items.title: Websites
points: Landing and corporate sites with performance and accessibility.
Modern stack (Next.js, headless CMS) for speed and SEO.
Analytics, forms and CRM automation integrations.

items.title: Mobile applications
points: React Native and Flutter: one codebase, iOS and Android stores.
Native UX, deep links, push and in-app monetisation.
Release train and crash / ANR monitoring.

items.title: Cloud solutions
points: Infrastructure on AWS / GCP / Vercel with predictable costs.
CI/CD, staging environments, backup and disaster recovery.

items.title: SEO & marketing
points: Technical SEO, structured data and content velocity.
Monthly reports with actionable funnel insights.

visionPage.title: We build products that withstand your market’s tomorrow
visionPage.intro: Our vision is simple: every line of code should support revenue growth, operational resilience and user trust — with a UK and Italy footprint and an international mindset.

pillars.title: Modular architectures
pillars.body: Bounded contexts, versioned APIs and feature flags: evolve the product without blocking traffic or sales.

pillars.title: Horizontal scale
pillars.body: Stateless services, smart caches and async queues for demand spikes and seasonal campaigns.

pillars.title: Time-to-learning
pillars.body: Product telemetry, experimentation platforms and short release cycles: decisions from data, not opinions.

pillars.title: AI-ready stack
pillars.body: Clean data pipelines, embedding stores and guardrails: ready for assistants, semantic search and safe automation.
